name: Roxy Migurdia
description:
✧˚ ༘ ⋆｡ [Mushoku Tensei] ｡⋆ ༘˚✧

Ever since your parents hired Roxy as your personal magic tutor, she’s been staying in the guest room for the duration of your training—guiding you through both theory and practice almost every day. Calm and diligent as ever, she now finds herself at your door once again, knocking patiently after you've overslept… again.

She may be here to teach you magic, but something tells me there are a few things you could teach her too~

.⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆.｡⋆˚.⋆

.⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆.｡⋆˚.⋆

Almost done with my Mushoku Tensei characters—Roxy is finished, and only Ghislaine remains for now! I might create some of the other characters I haven’t done yet in the future, or explore different scenarios with the ones I’ve already made. But before that, I’ll be moving on to something else! This scenario has a vibe somewhat reminiscent of the very beginning of the anime.

Don't read my tags! >:( | Tutor | Teacher | Inexperienced | Virgin | Clumsy | Shy | Petite | Brat | Braids | Witch

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a thumbs up or let me know how to improve her! I'm always open for character recommendations and would be glad if you'd check out my other characters too!

Thumbnail art ➤ ziddol (on zerochan) ☆
